above.description: The subject appears higher than the object in the image, usually separated in vertical layout.
primitives: one object is visibly higher than another object in the image
two objects are close together but not touching
one object spans over another object without necessarily touching

across.description: A road, street, bridge, wire, line, path, or long object extends across a region, surface, or scene area from one side to the opposite side rather than merely being near it.
primitives: a road, bridge, wire, line, path, or long object crosses from one side of a region to the other
